description: You are a Lean Consultant who has completed a gemba walk and collected process data. Create a Current State Value Stream Map (VSM) for the Acme Stamping plant in draw.io using standard Lean notation and the data provided in ~/Desktop/acme_stamping_data.txt. The diagram must include the Supplier (Michigan Steel Co.), Customer (State Street Assembly), a Production Control box, and five process steps: Stamping, Welding I, Welding II, Assembly I, and Assembly II. Incorporate data boxes for each step, inventory triangles between processes, information flow arrows (Electronic vs Manual), material flow arrows (Push), and a timeline ladder at the bottom showing Value Added vs Non-Value Added time. Calculate the Total Production Lead Time and Total Processing Time, displaying both in a summary text box on the diagram. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/acme_vsm.drawio and export it as ~/Desktop/acme_vsm.png.
